message:
fix(verifier_sdk): fix test helper scope and apply rustfmt

Move test_signing_key() and sign_migration_artifact() helper functions
inside the mod tests block where they belong — they were accidentally
placed after the closing brace. Also apply rustfmt to long lines in
verify_ed25519_signature_hex and canonical_migration_artifact_payload.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
